   740→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   741→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   742→
   743→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   744→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   745→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   746→
   747→    Args:
   748→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   749→        name: Candidate name to match
   750→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   751→
   752→    Returns:
   753→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   754→    """
   755→    try:
   756→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   757→            const { name, company } = args;
   758→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   759→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   760→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   761→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   762→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   763→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   764→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   765→                if (match) return match[1];
   766→            }
   767→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   768→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   769→            for (const el of meElements) {
   770→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   771→                let card = el.parentElement;
   772→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   773→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   774→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   775→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   776→                        if (match) return match[1];
   777→                    }
   778→                    card = card.parentElement;
   779→                }
   780→            }
   781→            return null;
   782→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   783→
   784→        if user_id:
   785→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   786→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   787→            return profile_url
   788→
   789→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   790→        return None
   791→
   792→    except Exception as e:
   793→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   794→        return None
   795→

   797→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   798→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   799→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   800→
   801→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   802→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"

   804→
   805→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   806→    keywords: str,
   807→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   808→    pages: int = 1,
   809→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   810→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   811→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   812→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   813→
   814→    Flow:
   815→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   816→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   817→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   818→    4. Optionally add company filter
   819→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   820→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   821→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   822→
   823→    Args:
   824→        keywords: Search keywords
   825→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   826→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   827→        browser: Browser manager instance
   828→        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   829→
   830→    Returns:
   831→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   832→    """
   833→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   834→
   835→    if browser is None:
   836→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   837→
   838→    config = get_config()
   839→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   840→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   841→
   842→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   843→
   844→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   845→    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   846→
   847→    with Progress(
   848→        SpinnerColumn(),
   849→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   850→        console=console,
   851→    ) as progress:
   852→        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   853→
   854→        try:
   855→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   856→
   857→            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   858→            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   859→            page = browser.page
   860→
   861→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
   862→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   863→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   864→
   865→            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   866→            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   867→            if not recruitment_tab:
   868→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   869→
   870→            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
   871→            await recruitment_tab.click()
   872→            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   873→            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   874→
   875→            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   876→
   877→            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   878→            try:
   879→                await page.wait_for_url(
   880→                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   881→                    timeout=15000,
   882→                )
   883→            except Exception:
   884→                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   885→
   886→            await async_random_delay("action")
   887→
   888→            # Step 2: Add keyword
   889→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   890→
   891→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   892→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   893→            if add_kw_btn:
   894→                await add_kw_btn.click()
   895→                await async_random_delay("action")
   896→
   897→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   898→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   899→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   900→            await async_random_delay("action")
   901→
   902→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   903→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   904→            if submit_btn:
   905→                await submit_btn.click()
   906→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   907→
   908→            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   909→            if company:
   910→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   911→                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   912→                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   913→                if add_co_btn:
   914→                    await add_co_btn.click()
   915→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   916→
   917→                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   918→                for co_name in company:
   919→                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   920→                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   921→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   922→
   923→                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   924→                    try:
   925→                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   926→                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   927→                        )
   928→                        if suggestion:
   929→                            await suggestion.click()
   930→                            await async_random_delay("action")
   931→                    except Exception:
   932→                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   933→
   934→            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   935→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   936→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   937→
   938→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   939→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   940→
   941→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   942→
   943→                if not candidates:
   944→                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   945→                    break
   946→
   947→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   948→                before_filter = len(candidates)
   949→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   950→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   951→                if filtered > 0:
   952→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   953→
   954→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   955→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   956→
   957→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   958→                    "keywords": keywords,
   959→                    "page": page_num,
   960→                    "results": len(candidates),
   961→                    "mode": "enterprise",
   962→                })
   963→
   964→                try:
   965→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   966→                except Exception as e:
   967→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
   968→
   969→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   970→                if page_num < pages:
   971→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   972→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   973→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   974→
   975→        except Exception as e:
   976→            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   977→            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
   978→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
   979→        finally:
   980→            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
   981→            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
   982→                try:
   983→                    await browser.close_current_tab()
   984→                except Exception:
   985→                    pass  # Best-effort cleanup; tab may already be closed
   986→
   987→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
   988→
   989→    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   990→    return all_candidates

   993→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   994→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
   995→
   996→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
   997→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
   998→
   999→    Args:
  1000→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1001→
  1002→    Returns:
  1003→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1004→    """
  1005→    candidates = []
  1006→
  1007→    try:
  1008→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1009→    except Exception:
  1010→        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
  1011→
  1012→    try:
  1013→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1014→            const candidates = [];
  1015→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1016→
  1017→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1018→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1019→            const cardSelectors = [
  1020→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1021→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1022→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1023→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1024→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1025→            ];
  1026→
  1027→            let cards = [];
  1028→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1029→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1030→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1031→            }
  1032→
  1033→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1034→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1035→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1036→                const foundCards = [];
  1037→
  1038→                for (const img of images) {
  1039→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1040→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1041→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1042→
  1043→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1044→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1045→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1046→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1047→                            break;
  1048→                        }
  1049→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1050→                    }
  1051→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1052→                }
  1053→                cards = foundCards;
  1054→            }
  1055→
  1056→            for (const card of cards) {
  1057→                const textParts = [];
  1058→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1059→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1060→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1061→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1062→                        textParts.push(text);
  1063→                    }
  1064→                }
  1065→
  1066→                let name = '';
  1067→                let company = '';
  1068→                let title = '';
  1069→
  1070→                const skipPatterns = [
  1071→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1072→                    /^不合适$/,
  1073→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1074→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1075→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1076→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1077→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1078→                ];
  1079→
  1080→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1081→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1082→                };
  1083→
  1084→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1085→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1086→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1087→
  1088→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1089→                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1090→                            name = part;
  1091→                            continue;
  1092→                        }
  1093→                    }
  1094→
  1095→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1096→                        company = part;
  1097→                        continue;
  1098→                    }
  1099→
  1100→                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1101→                        title = part;
  1102→                        break;
  1103→                    }
  1104→                }
  1105→
  1106→                if (!name) continue;
  1107→
  1108→                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1109→                let hash = 0;
  1110→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1111→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1112→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1113→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1114→                }
  1115→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1116→
  1117→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1118→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1119→
  1120→                // Try to extract profile URL
  1121→                let profileUrl = '';
  1122→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1123→                for (const link of links) {
  1124→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1125→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1126→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1127→                        break;
  1128→                    }
  1129→                }
  1130→
  1131→                candidates.push({
  1132→                    name: name,
  1133→                    title: title || '',
  1134→                    company: company || '',
  1135→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1136→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1137→                    location: '',
  1138→                });
  1139→            }
  1140→
  1141→            return candidates;
  1142→        }''')
  1143→
  1144→        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1145→
  1146→        for data in candidates_data:
  1147→            if data.get("name"):
  1148→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1149→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1150→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1151→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1152→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1153→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1154→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1155→                ))
  1156→
  1157→        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1158→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1159→
  1160→        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1161→
  1162→    except Exception as e:
  1163→        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1164→
  1165→    return candidates
  1166→

    22→async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    23→    """Startup / shutdown lifecycle."""
    24→    # Initialize singletons
    25→    queue = TaskQueue()
    26→    broadcaster = Broadcaster()
    27→    init_singletons(queue, broadcaster)
    28→
    29→    # Store on app.state for templates/ws access
    30→    app.state.queue = queue
    31→    app.state.broadcaster = broadcaster
    32→
    33→    # Start task queue worker
    34→    await queue.start()
    35→
    36→    # Initialize database (triggers WAL mode + migrations)
    37→    from src.models.database import get_db_manager
    38→    get_db_manager()
    39→
    40→    logger.info("Web service started")
    41→    yield
    42→
    43→    # Shutdown
    44→    await queue.stop()
    45→    logger.info("Web service stopped")
    46→
    47→
    48→def create_app() -> FastAPI:
    49→    """Create and configure the FastAPI application."""
    50→    app = FastAPI(
    51→        title="Maimai Assistant",
    52→        description="Semi-automated recruitment assistant for Maimai",
    53→        version="1.0.0",
    54→        lifespan=lifespan,
    55→    )
    56→
    57→    # --- Static files & templates ---
    58→    project_root = Path(__file__).parent.parent
    59→    static_dir = project_root / "static"
    60→    templates_dir = project_root / "templates"
    61→    static_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    62→    templates_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    63→
    64→    app.mount("/static", StaticFiles(directory=str(static_dir)), name="static")
    65→
    66→    # Store templates on app state for routers to access
    67→    app.state.templates = Jinja2Templates(directory=str(templates_dir))
    68→
    69→    # --- Register API routers ---
    70→    from src.web.routers import auth, search, candidates, message, pipeline, templates, status, export, ws
    71→
    72→    app.include_router(auth.router, prefix="/api/auth", tags=["auth"])
    73→    app.include_router(search.router, prefix="/api", tags=["search"])
    74→    app.include_router(candidates.router, prefix="/api", tags=["candidates"])
    75→    app.include_router(message.router, prefix="/api", tags=["message"])
    76→    app.include_router(pipeline.router, prefix="/api", tags=["pipeline"])
    77→    app.include_router(templates.router, prefix="/api", tags=["templates"])
    78→    app.include_router(status.router, prefix="/api", tags=["status"])
    79→    app.include_router(export.router, prefix="/api", tags=["export"])
    80→    app.include_router(ws.router, tags=["websocket"])
    81→
    82→    # --- Page routes (Jinja2 HTML) ---
    83→    from src.web.routers import pages
    84→    app.include_router(pages.router, tags=["pages"])
    85→
    86→    return app
    87→
    88→
    89→# Module-level app instance for uvicorn
    90→app = create_app()
    91→
    92→
    93→if __name__ == "__main__":
    94→    import uvicorn
    95→
    96→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Maimai Assistant Web Service")
    97→    parser.add_argument("--host", default="0.0.0.0", help="Bind host")
    98→    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8000, help="Bind port")
    99→    parser.add_argument("--cdp", default=None, help="Chrome CDP endpoint")
   100→    args = parser.parse_args()
   101→
   102→    if args.cdp:
   103→        from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   104→        get_browser_manager().set_cdp_endpoint(args.cdp)
   105→
   106→    uvicorn.run(
   107→        "src.web.app:app",
   108→        host=args.host,
   109→        port=args.port,
   110→        reload=False,
   111→        log_level="info",
   112→    )
   113→

1→"""Dependency injection for FastAPI endpoints.
     2→
     3→Provides shared singleton instances of BrowserManager, DatabaseManager,
     4→TaskQueue, and Broadcaster via FastAPI's Depends() system.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from typing import Optional
     8→
     9→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    10→from src.models.database import DatabaseManager, get_db_manager
    11→from src.web.task_queue import TaskQueue
    12→from src.web.progress import Broadcaster
    13→
    14→
    15→# Module-level singletons (initialized in app lifespan)
    16→_task_queue: Optional[TaskQueue] = None
    17→_broadcaster: Optional[Broadcaster] = None
    18→
    19→
    20→def init_singletons(queue: TaskQueue, broadcaster: Broadcaster) -> None:
    21→    """Called once during app lifespan startup."""
    22→    global _task_queue, _broadcaster
    23→    _task_queue = queue
    24→    _broadcaster = broadcaster
    25→
    26→
    27→def get_queue() -> TaskQueue:
    28→    if _task_queue is None:
    29→        raise RuntimeError("TaskQueue not initialized - app lifespan may not have run")
    30→    return _task_queue
    31→
    32→
    33→def get_broadcaster() -> Broadcaster:
    34→    if _broadcaster is None:
    35→        raise RuntimeError("Broadcaster not initialized - app lifespan may not have run")
    36→    return _broadcaster
    37→
    38→
    39→def get_browser() -> BrowserManager:
    40→    return get_browser_manager()
    41→
    42→
    43→def get_db() -> DatabaseManager:
    44→    return get_db_manager()
    45→

1→"""Authentication module for Maimai login.
     2→
     3→In CDP mode, the user logs in manually in their own Chrome before running
     4→CLI commands. This module verifies login status and provides guidance
     5→if the user is not logged in.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import asyncio
     9→from typing import Optional
    10→
    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→from loguru import logger
    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→from rich.panel import Panel
    15→
    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    18→from src.exceptions.errors import SessionExpiredError, LoginRequiredError
    19→
    20→console = Console()
    21→
    22→
    23→async def login(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
    24→    """
    25→    Verify login status in CDP-connected Chrome.
    26→
    27→    In CDP mode, the user is expected to already be logged in.
    28→    If not, instructions are printed for manual login in the browser.
    29→
    30→    Args:
    31→        browser: Browser manager instance (uses global if None)
    32→
    33→    Returns:
    34→        True if logged in
    35→    """
    36→    if browser is None:
    37→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    38→
    39→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP
    40→    page = await browser.start()
    41→
    42→    # Check if already logged in
    43→    if await check_login_status(page):
    44→        console.print("[green]Already logged in![/green]")
    45→        # Save session as backup
    46→        await browser.save_session()
    47→        return True
    48→
    49→    # Not logged in — guide the user
    50→    console.print(Panel(
    51→        "[bold]Not Logged In[/bold]\n\n"
    52→        "Please log in to Maimai in your Chrome browser:\n"
    53→        "1. Go to https://maimai.cn/login in Chrome\n"
    54→        "2. Scan QR code with Maimai app, OR\n"
    55→        "3. Enter phone number and verification code\n\n"
    56→        "[dim]Then run this command again to verify.[/dim]",
    57→        title="Maimai Login",
    58→        border_style="cyan"
    59→    ))
    60→
    61→    # Poll for login (user may log in while we wait)
    62→    # IMPORTANT: Do NOT call check_login_status() here — it navigates to
    63→    # search_center on every call, which resets the login page (kills QR code,
    64→    # clears phone input). Instead, watch the current URL for changes.
    65→    max_wait_seconds = 300  # 5 minutes timeout
    66→    poll_interval = 3
    67→    elapsed = 0
    68→
    69→    console.print("[dim]Waiting for login... (timeout: 5 minutes)[/dim]")
    70→
    71→    while elapsed < max_wait_seconds:
    72→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
    73→        elapsed += poll_interval
    74→
    75→        # Check for captcha
    76→        await check_captcha(page)
    77→
    78→        # Light check: see if user has navigated away from login page
    79→        current_url = page.url
    80→        if 'login' not in current_url.lower():
    81→            # User seems to have logged in — do a full verification
    82→            if await check_login_status(page):
    83→                console.print("[green]Login successful![/green]")
    84→                await browser.save_session()
    85→                console.print("[green]Session saved as backup[/green]")
    86→                return True
    87→
    88→    console.print("[red]Login timeout. Please log in manually and try again.[/red]")
    89→    return False
    90→
    91→
    92→async def check_login_status(page: Page) -> bool:
    93→    """
    94→    Check if user is currently logged in by navigating to a protected page
    95→    and observing whether Maimai redirects to the login page.
    96→
    97→    API probes can give false positives (server returns 200 but session is
    98→    actually stale). The redirect-based approach is reliable because Maimai's
    99→    server-side auth check only fires on real page navigations, and it will
   100→    redirect to the login page if the session is invalid.

    41→# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page
    42→MAIMAI_CHAT_URL = "https://maimai.cn/bizmember/uh_chat_pc?u2={user_id}&from=pc_web_search&fr=profile"
    43→
    44→
    45→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    46→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    47→
    48→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    49→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    50→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    51→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    52→    """
    53→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    54→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    55→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    56→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    57→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    58→        if key in params:
    59→            return params[key][0]
    60→    return None
    61→
    62→
    63→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    64→    page: Page,
    65→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    66→    config,
    67→    browser: BrowserManager,
    68→    maimai_id: str,
    69→    interactive: bool = False,
    70→    discovered_selectors=None,
    71→) -> bool:
    72→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
    73→
    74→    Tries in order:
    75→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
    76→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
    77→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
    78→
    79→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
    80→
    81→    Args:
    82→        page: Playwright page instance
    83→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
    84→        config: Config instance
    85→        browser: Browser manager instance
    86→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
    87→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
    88→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
    89→
    90→    Returns:
    91→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
    92→    """
    93→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    94→
    95→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
    96→    if not profile_url:
    97→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    98→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    99→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
   100→
   101→        if not profile_url:
   102→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   103→
   104→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   105→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   106→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   107→
   108→    if user_id:
   109→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   110→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   111→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   112→        return True
   113→
   114→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   115→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   116→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   117→    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   118→
   119→    current_url = page.url
   120→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   121→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   122→    if redirected_user_id:
   123→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   124→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   125→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   126→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   127→        return True
   128→
   129→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   130→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   131→    if chat_button_found:
   132→        await async_random_delay('action')
   133→        return True
   134→
   135→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   136→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   137→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   138→        console.print("[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]")
   139→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   140→        if result.is_populated:
   141→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   142→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   143→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   144→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   145→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   146→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   147→            return True
   148→
   149→    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   150→    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   151→    return False
   152→
   153→
   154→async def extract_contact_quota(page: Page) -> Optional[dict]:
   155→    """Extract contact quota from Quick Contact page's embedded share_data.
   156→
   157→    The Quick Contact page server-renders ``window.share_data`` which includes
   158→    ``mem_status.mem_info`` with remaining quotas for various member actions.
   159→
   160→    Args:
   161→        page: Playwright page on a Quick Contact (极速联系) page
   162→
   163→    Returns:
   164→        Dict with quota info, or None if data is unavailable::
   165→
   166→            {
   167→                'uh_left': int,        # 极速联系 remaining
   168→                'addfr_left': int,     # 加好友 remaining
   169→                'dc_left': int,        # 直聊 remaining
   170→                'expire_time': str,    # membership expiry
   171→                'cost': int,           # vouchers consumed per contact
   172→            }
   173→    """
   174→    try:
   175→        quota = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   176→            if (window.share_data && window.share_data.mem_status &&
   177→                window.share_data.mem_status.mem_info) {
   178→                const info = window.share_data.mem_status.mem_info;
   179→                return {
   180→                    uh_left: info.uh_left,
   181→                    addfr_left: info.addfr_left,
   182→                    dc_left: info.dc_left,
   183→                    expire_time: info.expire_time || null,
   184→                    cost: (window.share_data.fast_contact_pay_num || {}).final_num || 1,
   185→                };
   186→            }
   187→            return null;
   188→        }''')
   189→        return quota
   190→    except Exception as e:
   191→        logger.debug(f"Failed to extract contact quota: {e}")
   192→        return None
   193→
   194→
   195→async def fetch_contact_quota(browser: Optional['BrowserManager'] = None) -> Optional[dict]:
   196→    """Fetch current contact quota by navigating to a Quick Contact page.
   197→
   198→    Uses a well-known user ID to load the Quick Contact page and extract
   199→    ``window.share_data.mem_status.mem_info``. Useful for the ``status``
   200→    command or any context where quota needs to be checked independently.

    70→async def search_all_keywords(
    71→    browser: BrowserManager,
    72→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    73→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    74→    location: Optional[str],
    75→    max_pages: int,
    76→    start_page: int = 1,
    77→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    78→    """Iterate keywords, deduplicate, return combined results.
    79→
    80→    Args:
    81→        browser: BrowserManager instance
    82→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
    83→        company: Company filter strings
    84→        location: Location filter or None
    85→        max_pages: Pages per keyword
    86→        start_page: First page number
    87→
    88→    Returns:
    89→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
    90→    """
    91→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
    92→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
    93→
    94→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
    95→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Searching: {kw}[/bold blue]")
    96→        emit_progress("search_progress", keyword=kw, keyword_index=idx + 1,
    97→                       total_keywords=len(keywords), page=start_page, total_pages=max_pages)
    98→
    99→        candidates = await search_candidates(
   100→            keywords=kw,
   101→            company=company,
   102→            location=location,
   103→            pages=max_pages,
   104→            start_page=start_page,
   105→            browser=browser,
   106→        )
   107→
   108→        new_count = 0
   109→        for c in candidates:
   110→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   111→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   112→                all_candidates.append(c)
   113→                new_count += 1
   114→
   115→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   116→        emit_progress("search_keyword_done", keyword=kw, found=len(candidates),
   117→                       new=new_count, total_so_far=len(all_candidates))
   118→
   119→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
   120→
   121→
   122→async def search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   123→    browser: BrowserManager,
   124→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   125→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   126→    max_pages: int,
   127→    keep_last_tab_open: bool = False,
   128→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
   129→    """Iterate keywords via enterprise path, deduplicate, return combined results.
   130→
   131→    Args:
   132→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   133→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
   134→        company: Company filter strings
   135→        max_pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract per keyword
   136→        keep_last_tab_open: Keep the last enterprise tab open for inline messaging
   137→
   138→    Returns:
   139→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
   140→    """
   141→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   142→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   143→
   144→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   145→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Enterprise search: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   146→
   147→        is_last = (idx == len(keywords) - 1)
   148→        candidates = await search_candidates_enterprise(
   149→            keywords=kw,
   150→            company=company,
   151→            pages=max_pages,
   152→            browser=browser,
   153→            keep_tab_open=keep_last_tab_open and is_last,
   154→        )
   155→
   156→        new_count = 0
   157→        for c in candidates:
   158→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   159→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   160→                all_candidates.append(c)
   161→                new_count += 1
   162→
   163→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   164→
   165→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
   166→

   242→def generate_pipeline_report(
   243→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   244→    results: dict,
   245→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   246→    template: str,
   247→    mode: SearchMode,
   248→) -> str:
   249→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   250→
   251→    Args:
   252→        candidates: All candidates from search
   253→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   254→        keywords: Search keywords used
   255→        template: Template name used
   256→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   257→
   258→    Returns:
   259→        Path to the generated report file
   260→    """
   261→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   262→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   263→    from loguru import logger
   264→
   265→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   266→    config = get_config()
   267→    report_dir = Path(config.get('data.report_dir', 'data/reports'))
   268→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   269→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   270→
   271→    wb = Workbook()
   272→
   273→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   274→    ws_overview = wb.active
   275→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   276→
   277→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   278→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   279→    border = Border(
   280→        left=Side(style="thin"), right=Side(style="thin"),
   281→        top=Side(style="thin"), bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   282→    )
   283→
   284→    overview_rows = [
   285→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   286→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   287→        ("消息模板", template),
   288→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   289→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   290→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   291→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   292→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   293→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   294→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   295→    ]
   296→
   297→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   298→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   299→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   300→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   301→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   302→            cell.border = border
   303→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   304→
   305→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   306→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   307→
   308→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   309→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   310→
   311→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "失败原因"]
   312→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   313→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   314→        cell.font = header_font
   315→        cell.fill = header_fill
   316→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   317→        cell.border = border
   318→
   319→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   320→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   321→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   322→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   323→
   324→    status_map = {
   325→        "sent": "已发送",
   326→        "failed": "失败",
   327→        "skipped": "跳过",
   328→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   329→    }
   330→
   331→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   332→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   333→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   334→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   335→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   336→
   337→        row_data = [r_idx, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or "", c.maimai_id, status_label, reason]
   338→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   339→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   340→            cell.border = border
   341→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   342→
   343→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 30}
   344→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   345→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   346→
   347→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   348→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   349→
   350→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   351→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   352→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   353→    return str(report_path)
   354→
   355→
   356→def save_run_history(
   357→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   358→    template: str,
   359→    mode: SearchMode,
   360→    results: dict,
   361→    dry_run: bool,
   362→    report_path: Optional[str] = None,
   363→) -> None:
   364→    """Append a pipeline run record to JSON and regenerate Markdown summary.
   365→
   366→    Produces two files under data/:
   367→    - run_history.json: machine-readable array of all runs
   368→    - run_history.md: human-readable Markdown table
   369→    """
   370→    import json
   371→    from loguru import logger
   372→
   373→    data_dir = Path("data")
   374→    data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   375→    json_path = data_dir / "run_history.json"
   376→    md_path = data_dir / "run_history.md"
   377→
   378→    # Read existing records
   379→    records: List[dict] = []
   380→    if json_path.exists():
   381→        try:
   382→            records = json.loads(json_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   383→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, IOError):
   384→            logger.warning("Failed to read run_history.json, starting fresh")
   385→
   386→    # Build new record
   387→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   388→    record = {
   389→        "timestamp": timestamp.isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
   390→        "keywords": list(keywords),
   391→        "template": template,
   392→        "mode": mode.value if isinstance(mode, SearchMode) else mode,
   393→        "dry_run": dry_run,
   394→        "total": results.get("total", 0),
   395→        "sent": results.get("sent", 0),
   396→        "failed": results.get("failed", 0),
   397→        "skipped": results.get("skipped", 0),
   398→        "rate_limited": results.get("rate_limited", 0),
   399→        "report_file": Path(report_path).name if report_path else None,
   400→    }
   401→    records.append(record)
   402→
   403→    # Write JSON
   404→    json_path.write_text(
   405→        json.dumps(records, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8"
   406→    )
   407→
   408→    # Regenerate Markdown from full history
   409→    lines = [
   410→        "# Pipeline 运行历史",
   411→        "",
   412→        "| 时间 | 关键词 | 模板 | 模式 | 搜索数 | 发送 | 失败 | 跳过 | 限流 | 报告 |",
   413→        "|------|--------|------|------|--------|------|------|------|------|------|",
   414→    ]
   415→    for r in records:
   416→        ts = r["timestamp"][:16].replace("T", " ")
   417→        kws = ", ".join(r["keywords"])
   418→        tpl = r["template"]
   419→        m = r["mode"]
   420→        total = str(r["total"])
   421→        if r.get("dry_run"):
   422→            sent = failed = skipped = rate_limited = "-"
   423→        else:
   424→            sent = str(r["sent"])
   425→            failed = str(r["failed"])
   426→            skipped = str(r["skipped"])
   427→            rate_limited = str(r["rate_limited"])
   428→        report = r.get("report_file") or "-"
   429→        lines.append(
   430→            f"| {ts} | {kws} | {tpl} | {m} | {total} | {sent} | {failed} | {skipped} | {rate_limited} | {report} |"
   431→        )
   432→
   433→    md_path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   434→    logger.info(f"Run history updated: {json_path}")
   435→    console.print(f"[dim]运行历史已更新: {md_path}[/dim]")
   436→

   438→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   439→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   440→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   441→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   442→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   443→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   444→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   445→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   446→    has_scores = any(getattr(c, 'score', None) is not None for c in candidates[:1])
   447→    if has_scores:
   448→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   449→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   450→
   451→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   452→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '']
   453→        if has_scores:
   454→            row.append(str(getattr(c, 'score', '')))
   455→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   456→        table.add_row(*row)
   457→
   458→    console.print(table)
   459→
   460→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   461→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   462→

   465→    """Display send results summary table."""
